nodes.title: 提示词后缀

nodes.title: 提示词
widgets_values:
时长: 8s
00s-02s: 天使静止站立，缓缓向两侧展开巨大的羽翼。
02s-05s: 翅膀全力挥动，身体离开地面腾空而起。
05s-08s: 冲向高空云端，镜头转为背后跟随视角俯瞰大地。
镜头从正面的中景开始，随着天使起飞转为低仰角追踪，最后演变为高空背后的跟随远景镜头。
一名穿着精致古铜色盔甲的女性天使站在深秋的金色草原上，天空布满厚重的阴云，阳光穿透云层洒下柔和的光影。她巨大的灰白色羽翼从收拢状态有力地向两侧完全舒展。紧接着，她用力扇动双翼，身体笔直冲向天空。镜头紧紧跟随她的上升轨迹，画面从荒野背景迅速切换为云端之上的视角。羽毛在强风中剧烈颤动，脚下的土地逐渐变得渺小，层层云海在身下铺开，整体画面呈现出一种神圣而宏大的史诗感。
音频: 呼啸的风声，沉重的羽翼扇动声，轻微的盔甲碰撞声，空灵神圣的背景音乐。
Duration: 8s
00s-02s: The angel stands still and slowly unfurls her massive wings to the sides.
02s-05s: Wings flap powerfully as she leaps into the air and begins her ascent.
05s-08s: She soars into the high altitude clouds, with the camera shifting to a rear follow shot overlooking the earth.
The camera starts from a front medium shot, transitions to a low-angle tracking shot during takeoff, and ends with a high-altitude rear-view aerial follow shot.
A female angel in intricate bronze armor stands in a golden autumn meadow under a moody, overcast sky with soft cinematic lighting breaking through. Her enormous grayish-white feathered wings unfold powerfully from her back. She pushes off the ground, her wings beating the air with immense force as she ascends rapidly. The camera tracks her upward movement, shifting from the terrestrial field to a breathtaking aerial perspective above the clouds. Feathers rustle intensely in the wind, and the vast landscape shrinks below as she soars toward the horizon, creating a sense of divine epic scale and ethereal beauty.
Audio: Rushing wind sounds, heavy rhythmic wing beats, subtle metallic clinking of armor, ethereal and divine ambient music.

inputs.text: A medium close-up shot features a Caucasian man with a closely shaven head and face, wearing a black baseball cap with "PNTR" in white letters on the front, and a dark grey t-shirt with "JUST DO IT" visible across his chest. A small black microphone is clipped to his shirt collar. He is positioned slightly to the left of the frame, looking intently downwards and to his right, his eyes focused off-camera. His facial expression is one of deep concentration, with his brow slightly furrowed. As he looks down, a quick sniff sound is heard, and then he speaks with a deep male voice and a slightly frustrated tone, saying, "I think it's so bad." The camera remains static throughout, maintaining a shallow depth of field, which keeps the man in sharp focus while the background is softly blurred, revealing a light-colored wall with white wooden shelving or trim, and a partially open white wooden door on the right. After a brief pause, another short, audible sniff is heard. The man then continues to speak, his voice maintaining the same quality, as he states, "So bad. So bad." He elaborates further, emphasizing his point with a final statement, "This got to be, it's got to be the worst tool I've ever seen."
